        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Classify the active PE/CLI artifact and inventory exact assembly/module identity, target framework evidence, references, resources, and custom attributes without loading or executing target code. Returns bounded pages and explicit partial or malformed coverage.";
            examples: readonly [
                { input: {}; title: "Example inspect managed artifact request" },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    attribute_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    attribute_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_file_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_heap_item_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_metadata_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_table_rows: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    reference_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    reference_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    resource_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    resource_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "managed-provider";
            name: "inspect_managed_artifact";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<$ZodLooseShape, $strip>;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Inspect bounded PE/CLI metadata members, signatures, method body IL hashes, exception regions, call edges, and field-access anchors without loading or executing target code. Metadata tokens are reported as build-local coordinates bound to the artifact SHA-256 and MVID.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: { edge_limit: 100; method_limit: 25 };
                    title: "Example inspect managed members request";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    edge_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    edge_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    field_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    field_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    instruction_anchor_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_file_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_heap_item_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_metadata_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_method_body_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_method_instructions: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_table_rows: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    member_ref_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    member_ref_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    method_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    method_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    type_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    type_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "managed-provider";
            name: "inspect_managed_members";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<$ZodLooseShape, $strip>;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Inspect PE/CLI ModuleRef, ImplMap/PInvoke declarations, CLI native-header indicators, and non-IL method implementation flags without loading or executing target code. Results are managed declarations and degraded native-boundary observations, not verified native exports or addresses.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: { implementation_limit: 50; import_limit: 50 };
                    title: "Example inspect managed/native boundary request";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    implementation_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    implementation_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    import_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    import_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_file_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_heap_item_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_metadata_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_table_rows: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    module_ref_limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    module_ref_offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "managed-provider";
            name: "inspect_managed_native_boundaries";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<$ZodLooseShape, $strip>;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Compare two authenticated inspect_managed_members Evidence records using unique-only CIL/signature and structural method-shape tiers. Names are reported as observations but are not used as a matching basis; metadata tokens are remapped as build-local coordinates bound to each artifact SHA-256 and MVID.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        left: | {
                            analysis_profile: {
                                digest: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                schema_version: 1;
                            };
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }

            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    left: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_candidates: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_field_matches: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_method_matches: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    right: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    unknown_registry_approved: ZodOptional<ZodLiteral<true>>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "compare_managed_members";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<$ZodLooseShape, $strip>;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "List bounded page targets from an approved user-owned loopback Chrome DevTools Protocol endpoint. Only targets whose current URL matches an approved exact origin are returned; URL credentials, query values, and fragments are redacted.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_origins: ["https://app.example.test"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9222";
                        limit: 100;
                        offset: 0;
                    };
                    title: "List approved browser page targets";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_origins: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "list_browser_targets";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            excluded: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    disallowed_origin: ZodNumber;
                                    non_page: ZodNumber;
                                    unsupported_url: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            targets: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    has_more: ZodBoolean;
                                    items: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                attached: ...;
                                                origin: ...;
                                                target_id: ...;
                                                title: ...;
                                                type: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    limit: ZodNumber;
                                    next_offset: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                                    offset: ZodNumber;
                                    total: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Passively inspect one approved page target through CDP without evaluating JavaScript, navigating, clicking, closing, or mutating the page. Returns bounded DOM structure, accessibility, scripts, resources, attach-window network and console metadata, workers, and redacted storage inventory as Evidence v2.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_origins: ["https://app.example.test"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9222";
                        console_text_approved: false;
                        include_accessibility_text: false;
                        include_console_text: false;
                        include_json_body_shapes: false;
                        include_script_sources: false;
                        include_storage_keys: false;
                        include_websocket_shapes: false;
                        json_body_schema_approved: false;
                        limits: {
                            max_ax_nodes: 2000;
                            max_ax_text_field_bytes: 1024;
                            max_console_events: 200;
                            max_console_text_field_bytes: 1024;
                            max_dom_nodes: 2000;
                            max_frames: 200;
                            max_json_body_bytes: 1048576;
                            max_json_shape_depth: 20;
                            max_json_shape_nodes: 5000;
                            max_network_events: 1000;
                            max_resources: 2000;
                            max_script_source_bytes: 1048576;
                            max_scripts: 200;
                            max_storage_keys: 1000;
                            max_total_ax_text_bytes: 65536;
                            max_total_console_text_bytes: 65536;
                            max_total_json_body_bytes: 4194304;
                            max_total_script_source_bytes: 4194304;
                            max_total_websocket_shape_bytes: 1048576;
                            max_websocket_events: 500;
                            max_websocket_shape_bytes: 65536;
                            max_workers: 500;
                        };
                        observation_ms: 500;
                        target_id: "TARGET_ID_FROM_LIST_BROWSER_TARGETS";
                        websocket_shape_approved: false;
                    };
                    title: "Inspect one approved browser page";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_origins: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    console_text_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_accessibility_text: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_console_text: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_json_body_shapes: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_script_sources: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_storage_keys: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_websocket_shapes: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    json_body_schema_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_ax_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_ax_text_field_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_console_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_console_text_field_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_dom_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_frames: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_json_body_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_json_shape_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_json_shape_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_network_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_resources: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_script_source_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_scripts: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_storage_keys: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_ax_text_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_console_text_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_json_body_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_script_source_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_websocket_shape_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_websocket_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_websocket_shape_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_workers: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    observation_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    target_id: ZodString;
                    websocket_shape_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "inspect_web_page";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            accessibility: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    nodes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                description: ...;
                                                ignored: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                                node_id: ...;
                                                parent_id: ...;
                                                role: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    text_capture: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            excluded_fields: ZodNumber;
                                            retained_bytes: ZodNumber;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            truncated_fields: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    total_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            capture_window: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    ended_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                    observation_ms: ZodNumber;
                                    started_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            completeness: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attach_limited_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    conditions: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                attach_limited: ...;
                                                complete_within_window: ...;
                                                policy_filtered: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    dropped_events: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            console_events: ZodNumber;
                                            network_requests: ZodNumber;
                                            scripts: ZodNumber;
                                            timeline_events: ZodNumber;
                                            total: ZodNumber;
                                            webmcp_tools: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_connections: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_frames: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    excluded: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ count: ...; reason: ...; section: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    policy_filtered_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            attach_limited: "attach_limited";
                                            complete_within_window: "complete_within_window";
                                            policy_filtered: "policy_filtered";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    truncated_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    unavailable_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            console: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    coverage_started_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                    events: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                argument_types: ...;
                                                column: ...;
                                                line: ...;
                                                text_capture: ...;
                                                timestamp: ...;
                                                type: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    prior_activity_available: ZodLiteral<false>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            dom: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    nodes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                attribute_names: ...;
                                                index: ...;
                                                node_name: ...;
                                                node_type: ...;
                                                node_value_length: ...;
                                                parent_index: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    total_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            frames: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        frame_id: ZodString;
                                        origin: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        parent_frame_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        url: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            metadata: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    agent_hints: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { declaration: ...; mechanism: ...; trust: ...; url: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    dom_urls: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                attribute: ...;
                                                destination_scope: ...;
                                                node_index: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    excluded_dom_urls: ZodNumber;
                                    headers_allowlisted: ZodLiteral<true>;
                                    responses: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                content_encoding: ...;
                                                content_length: ...;
                                                csp: ...;
                                                links: ...;
                                                mime_type: ...;
                                                policies: ...;
                                                request_id: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            network: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    coverage_started_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                    prior_activity_available: ZodLiteral<false>;
                                    requests: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                body_shapes: ...;
                                                encoded_data_length: ...;
                                                initiator: ...;
                                                method: ...;
                                                mime_type: ...;
                                                origin: ...;
                                                request_id: ...;
                                                resource_type: ...;
                                                status: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    websocket_events: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                direction: ...;
                                                opcode: ...;
                                                payload_bytes: ...;
                                                payload_shape: ...;
                                                request_id: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            resources: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        content_size: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                                        mime_type: ZodString;
                                        origin: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        resource_key: ZodString;
                                        type: ZodString;
                                        url: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            scripts: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    items: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                cdp_hash: ...;
                                                frame_id: ...;
                                                is_module: ...;
                                                language: ...;
                                                length: ...;
                                                origin: ...;
                                                resource_reconciliation: ...;
                                                script_key: ...;
                                                source: ...;
                                                source_map_url: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    total: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            storage: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    cache_names: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    indexed_db_names: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    local_storage_keys: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    origin: ZodString;
                                    quota_bytes: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                                    session_storage_keys: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    usage_bytes: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                                    values_redacted: ZodLiteral<true>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            target: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attached: ZodBoolean;
                                    origin: ZodString;
                                    target_id: ZodString;
                                    title: ZodString;
                                    type: ZodString;
                                    url: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            workers: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        attached: ZodBoolean;
                                        opener_target_id: ZodDefault<ZodNullable<(...)>>;
                                        origin: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        parent_frame_id: ZodDefault<ZodNullable<(...)>>;
                                        target_id: ZodString;
                                        type: ZodString;
                                        url: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Capture explicitly approved JavaScript source from one approved CDP page and statically derive a bounded chunk graph, route and endpoint candidates, vendor fingerprints, page-declared WebMCP metadata, and optional separately approved source-map evidence. JavaScript is parsed but never executed.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_origins: ["https://app.example.test"];
                        analysis_limits: {
                            max_ast_nodes: 250000;
                            max_findings: 1000;
                            max_original_sources: 2000;
                            max_source_map_bytes: 4194304;
                            max_source_map_mappings: 10000;
                            max_source_maps: 100;
                            max_total_source_map_bytes: 16777216;
                        };
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9222";
                        fetch_source_maps: false;
                        include_accessibility_text: false;
                        include_script_sources: true;
                        include_storage_keys: false;
                        observation_ms: 500;
                        source_capture_approved: true;
                        source_map_fetch_approved: false;
                        target_id: "TARGET_ID_FROM_LIST_BROWSER_TARGETS";
                    };
                    title: "Analyze an approved page bundle";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_origins: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    analysis_limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_ast_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_findings: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_original_sources: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_source_map_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_source_map_mappings: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_source_maps: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_source_map_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    console_text_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    fetch_source_maps: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_accessibility_text: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_console_text: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_json_body_shapes: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_script_sources: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<true>>;
                    include_storage_keys: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    include_websocket_shapes: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    json_body_schema_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_ax_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_ax_text_field_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_console_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_console_text_field_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_dom_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_frames: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_json_body_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_json_shape_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_json_shape_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_network_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_resources: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_script_source_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_scripts: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_storage_keys: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_ax_text_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_console_text_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_json_body_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_script_source_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_websocket_shape_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_websocket_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_websocket_shape_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_workers: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    observation_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    source_capture_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    source_map_fetch_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    target_id: ZodString;
                    websocket_shape_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "analyze_web_bundle";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            capture: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    scripts_analyzed: ZodNumber;
                                    scripts_observed: ZodNumber;
                                    source_artifacts: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                bytes: ...;
                                                charset: ...;
                                                media_type: ...;
                                                sha256: ...;
                                                text_available: ...;
                                                uri: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    target_url: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            completeness: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    dropped_findings: ZodNumber;
                                    parse_failures: ZodNumber;
                                    parsed_scripts: ZodNumber;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            complete_within_limits: "complete_within_limits";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    visited_ast_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            inferences: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        basis: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        confidence: ZodEnum<{ high: ...; low: ...; medium: ... }>;
                                        kind: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                bundle_runtime: ...;
                                                route_framework: ...;
                                                vendor_fingerprint: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        value: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            observations: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    chunks: ZodObject<
                                        { edges: ZodArray<(...)>; nodes: ZodArray<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    endpoints: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ location: ...; mechanism: ...; value: ... }, $strip>,
