                                    >;
                                    routes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ location: ...; mechanism: ...; value: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    source_maps: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            dropped: ZodNumber;
                                            dropped_script_keys: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            items: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            processed: ZodNumber;
                                            requested: ZodNumber;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    webmcp_declarations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                description: ...;
                                                location: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                                schema_property_names: ...;
                                                trust: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            unknowns: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        affected_script_keys: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        dimension: ZodString;
                                        reason: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: false;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Arm a bounded CDP observation window while the user operates the page. Allows approved same-origin reload and SPA navigation, records ordered navigation, redirect, lifecycle, and failure metadata, and stops before retaining an out-of-policy destination.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_origins: ["https://app.example.test"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9222";
                        max_timeline_events: 2000;
                        observation_ms: 10000;
                        target_id: "TARGET_ID_FROM_LIST_BROWSER_TARGETS";
                    };
                    title: "Observe one external user action";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_origins: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    max_timeline_events: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    observation_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    target_id: ZodString;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "observe_web_session";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            completeness: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attach_limited_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    conditions: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                attach_limited: ...;
                                                complete_within_window: ...;
                                                policy_filtered: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    dropped_events: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            console_events: ZodNumber;
                                            network_requests: ZodNumber;
                                            scripts: ZodNumber;
                                            timeline_events: ZodNumber;
                                            total: ZodNumber;
                                            webmcp_tools: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_connections: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_frames: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    excluded: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ count: ...; reason: ...; section: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    policy_filtered_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            attach_limited: "attach_limited";
                                            complete_within_window: "complete_within_window";
                                            policy_filtered: "policy_filtered";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    truncated_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    unavailable_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            target: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    final_url: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                    initial_url: ZodString;
                                    target_id: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            timeline: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        destination_scope: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        detail: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        frame_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        loader_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        request_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        sequence: ZodNumber;
                                        timestamp: ZodNumber;
                                        type: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                lifecycle: ...;
                                                load_failed: ...;
                                                navigation_committed: ...;
                                                navigation_requested: ...;
                                                redirect: ...;
                                                same_document_navigation: ...;
                                                same_origin_reload: ...;
                                                target_terminated: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        url: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            window: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    armed_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                    end_reason: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            target_left_scope: "target_left_scope";
                                            target_terminated: "target_terminated";
                                            window_elapsed: "window_elapsed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    ended_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                    requested_ms: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Passively inventory page-registered WebMCP tools using the experimental CDP WebMCP domain. Metadata is bounded and page-declared-untrusted; REA never registers or invokes discovered tools.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_origins: ["https://app.example.test"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9222";
                        max_schema_bytes: 262144;
                        max_schema_depth: 20;
                        max_schema_nodes: 5000;
                        max_tools: 500;
                        observation_ms: 100;
                        target_id: "TARGET_ID_FROM_LIST_BROWSER_TARGETS";
                    };
                    title: "Discover current WebMCP declarations";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_origins: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    max_schema_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_schema_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_schema_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    max_tools: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    observation_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    target_id: ZodString;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "discover_webmcp_tools";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            completeness: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attach_limited_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    conditions: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                attach_limited: ...;
                                                complete_within_window: ...;
                                                policy_filtered: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    dropped_events: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            console_events: ZodNumber;
                                            network_requests: ZodNumber;
                                            scripts: ZodNumber;
                                            timeline_events: ZodNumber;

                                            websocket_frames: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;

                                    >;
                                    policy_filtered_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;

                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;

                                        {
                                            attach_limited: "attach_limited";
                                            complete_within_window: "complete_within_window";
                                            policy_filtered: "policy_filtered";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    truncated_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;

                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            status: ZodEnum<
                                { available: "available"; unavailable: "unavailable" },
                            >;
                            target: ZodObject<
                                { origin: ZodString; target_id: ZodString; url: ZodString },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            tools: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    items: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                annotations: ...;
                                                declaration_kind: ...;
                                                description: ...;
                                                frame_id: ...;
                                                frame_url: ...;
                                                input_schema_shape: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                                owner_origin: ...;
                                                registration_source: ...;
                                                tool_key: ...;
                                                trust: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    total: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Compare two normalized web captures across DOM, scripts, resources, network, safe metadata, and optional WebMCP inventories. Stable observed changes are distinguished from unknown absence caused by incomplete capture coverage.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        after: {
                            inspection: {
                                accessibility: {
                                    nodes: never[];
                                    text_capture: {
                                        excluded_fields: number;
                                        retained_bytes: number;
                                        status: string;
                                        truncated_fields: number;
                                    };
                                    total_nodes: number;
                                };
                                browser: {
                                    js_version: string;
                                    product: string;
                                    protocol_version: string;
                                    revision: string;
                                    user_agent: string;
                                };
                                capture_window: {
                                    ended_at: string;
                                    observation_ms: number;
                                    started_at: string;
                                };
                                completeness: {
                                    attach_limited_sections: never[];
                                    conditions: string[];
                                    dropped_events: {
                                        console_events: number;
                                        network_requests: number;
                                        scripts: number;
                                        timeline_events: number;
                                        total: number;
                                        webmcp_tools: number;
                                        websocket_connections: number;
                                        websocket_frames: number;
                                    };
                                    excluded: never[];
                                    policy_filtered_sections: never[];
                                    status: string;
                                    truncated_sections: never[];
                                    unavailable_sections: never[];
                                };
                                console: {
                                    coverage_started_at: string;
                                    events: never[];
                                    prior_activity_available: boolean;
                                };
                                dom: { nodes: never[]; total_nodes: number };
                                frames: never[];
                                limitations: never[];
                                metadata: {
                                    agent_hints: never[];
                                    dom_urls: never[];
                                    excluded_dom_urls: number;
                                    headers_allowlisted: boolean;
                                    responses: never[];
                                };
                                network: {
                                    coverage_started_at: string;
                                    prior_activity_available: boolean;
                                    requests: never[];
                                    websocket_events: never[];
                                };
                                resources: never[];
                                schema_version: number;
                                scripts: { items: never[]; total: number };
                                storage: {
                                    cache_names: never[];
                                    indexed_db_names: never[];
                                    local_storage_keys: never[];
                                    origin: string;
                                    quota_bytes: null;
                                    session_storage_keys: never[];
                                    usage_bytes: null;
                                    values_redacted: boolean;
                                };
                                target: {
                                    attached: boolean;
                                    origin: string;
                                    target_id: string;
                                    title: string;
                                    type: string;
                                    url: string;
                                };
                                workers: never[];
                            };
                        };

                            inspection: {
                                accessibility: {
                                    nodes: never[];
                                    text_capture: {

                                    unavailable_sections: never[];

                                    events: never[];
                                    prior_activity_available: boolean;
                                };

                                    coverage_started_at: string;
                                    prior_activity_available: boolean;
                                    requests: never[];
                                    websocket_events: never[];
                                };

                                schema_version: number;
                                scripts: { items: never[]; total: number };
                                storage: {
                                    cache_names: never[];
                                    indexed_db_names: never[];
                                    local_storage_keys: never[];
                                    origin: string;
                                    quota_bytes: null;

                                    origin: string;
                                    target_id: string;
                                    title: string;

                                    url: string;
                                };

                            };
                        };
                        max_changes: 2000;
                    };
                    title: "Compare two normalized captures";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    after: ZodObject<
                        {
                            inspection: ZodObject<
                                {

                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    frames: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { frame_id: ...; origin: ...; parent_frame_id: ...; url: ... },

                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    metadata: ZodObject<

                                            },

                                        >,
                                    >;

                                    scripts: ZodObject<

                                        $strip,
                                    >;

                                        $strip,
                                    >;

                                        {

                                                target_id: ...;
                                                type: ...;
                                                url: ...;

                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;

                                            headers_allowlisted: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                            responses: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    network: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            coverage_started_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                            prior_activity_available: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                            requests: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            websocket_events: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    resources: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                content_size: ...;
                                                mime_type: ...;
                                                origin: ...;
                                                resource_key: ...;
                                                type: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    scripts: ZodObject<
                                        { items: ZodArray<(...)>; total: ZodNumber },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    storage: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            cache_names: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            indexed_db_names: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            local_storage_keys: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            origin: ZodString;
                                            quota_bytes: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            session_storage_keys: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            usage_bytes: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            values_redacted: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    target: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            attached: ZodBoolean;
                                            origin: ZodString;
                                            target_id: ZodString;
                                            title: ZodString;
                                            type: ZodString;
                                            url: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    workers: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                attached: ...;
                                                opener_target_id: ...;
                                                origin: ...;
                                                parent_frame_id: ...;
                                                target_id: ...;
                                                type: ...;
                                                url: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            webmcp: ZodDefault<
                                ZodNullable<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            browser: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            completeness: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            limitations: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            target: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            tools: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    max_changes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "compare_web_captures";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            after_target: ZodObject<
                                { target_id: ZodString; url: ZodString },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            before_target: ZodObject<
                                { target_id: ZodString; url: ZodString },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            dimensions: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    dom_structure: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            changes: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_changes: ZodNumber;
                                            reason: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            total_changes: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    metadata: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            changes: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_changes: ZodNumber;
                                            reason: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            total_changes: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    network: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            changes: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_changes: ZodNumber;
                                            reason: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            total_changes: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    resources: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            changes: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_changes: ZodNumber;
                                            reason: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            total_changes: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    scripts: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            changes: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_changes: ZodNumber;
                                            reason: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            total_changes: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    webmcp: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            changes: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_changes: ZodNumber;
                                            reason: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            total_changes: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            overall_status: ZodEnum<
                                { changed: "changed"; unchanged: "unchanged"; unknown: "unknown" },
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: false;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Capture the current visible viewport of one approved page as a bounded, content-addressed PNG artifact. Screenshot capture requires separate explicit approval and never scrolls, navigates, or evaluates page JavaScript.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_origins: ["https://app.example.test"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9222";
                        maximum_image_bytes: 4194304;
                        screenshot_approved: true;
                        target_id: "TARGET_ID_FROM_LIST_BROWSER_TARGETS";
                    };
                    title: "Capture an approved viewport";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_origins: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    maximum_image_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    screenshot_approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    target_id: ZodString;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "capture_web_screenshot";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            artifact: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    bytes: ZodNumber;
                                    data_base64: ZodString;
                                    media_type: ZodLiteral<"image/png">;
                                    sha256: ZodString;
                                    uri: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            captured_at: ZodISODateTime;
                            completeness: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attach_limited_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    conditions: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                attach_limited: ...;
                                                complete_within_window: ...;
                                                policy_filtered: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    dropped_events: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            console_events: ZodNumber;
                                            network_requests: ZodNumber;
                                            scripts: ZodNumber;
                                            timeline_events: ZodNumber;
                                            total: ZodNumber;
                                            webmcp_tools: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_connections: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_frames: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    excluded: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ count: ...; reason: ...; section: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    policy_filtered_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            attach_limited: "attach_limited";
                                            complete_within_window: "complete_within_window";
                                            policy_filtered: "policy_filtered";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    truncated_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
