                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    unavailable_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            target: ZodObject<
                                { origin: ZodString; target_id: ZodString; url: ZodString },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            viewport: ZodObject<{ height: ZodNumber; width: ZodNumber }, $strip>;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Compare two self-verifying PNG screenshot artifacts with bounded local pixel metrics. Returns exact changed-pixel ratios and channel deltas without OCR or external services.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        after: {
                            bytes: number;
                            data_base64: string;
                            media_type: string;
                            sha256: string;
                            uri: string;
                        };
                        before: {
                            bytes: number;
                            data_base64: string;
                            media_type: string;
                            sha256: string;
                            uri: string;
                        };
                        channel_threshold: 0;
                        maximum_pixels: 16000000;
                    };
                    title: "Compare two screenshot artifacts";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    after: ZodObject<
                        {
                            bytes: ZodNumber;
                            data_base64: ZodString;
                            media_type: ZodLiteral<"image/png">;
                            sha256: ZodString;
                            uri: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    before: ZodObject<
                        {
                            bytes: ZodNumber;
                            data_base64: ZodString;
                            media_type: ZodLiteral<"image/png">;
                            sha256: ZodString;
                            uri: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    channel_threshold: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    maximum_pixels: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "browser-provider";
            name: "compare_web_screenshots";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            after: ZodObject<{ height: ZodNumber; width: ZodNumber }, $strip>;
                            before: ZodObject<{ height: ZodNumber; width: ZodNumber }, $strip>;
                            changed_pixels: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                            changed_ratio: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                            channel_threshold: ZodNumber;
                            compared_pixels: ZodNumber;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            maximum_channel_delta: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                            mean_absolute_channel_delta: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            status: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    different: "different";
                                    dimension_mismatch: "dimension_mismatch";
                                    identical: "identical";
                                },
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "List Electron file:// page targets from an approved user-owned loopback CDP endpoint. Every path is canonicalized and must remain contained by an approved filesystem root, including after symlink resolution.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_file_roots: ["/Applications/Example.app/Contents/Resources"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9223";
                        limit: 100;
                        offset: 0;
                    };
                    title: "List approved Electron file pages";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_file_roots: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodString>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    limit: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    offset: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "electron-provider";
            name: "list_electron_targets";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            excluded: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    non_page: ZodNumber;
                                    outside_root: ZodNumber;
                                    unsupported_url: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            targets: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    has_more: ZodBoolean;
                                    items: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                attached: ...;
                                                file_path: ...;
                                                target_id: ...;
                                                title: ...;
                                                type: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    limit: ZodNumber;
                                    next_offset: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                                    offset: ZodNumber;
                                    total: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: true;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Passively inspect one approved Electron file page through CDP. Returns root-confined frames, DOM structure, resource paths, and scripts without evaluating renderer JavaScript or invoking Electron APIs; script contents require separate approval.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        allowed_file_roots: ["/Applications/Example.app/Contents/Resources"];
                        approved: true;
                        cdp_endpoint: "http://127.0.0.1:9223";
                        include_script_sources: false;
                        limits: {
                            max_dom_nodes: 2000;
                            max_frames: 200;
                            max_resources: 2000;
                            max_script_source_bytes: 1048576;
                            max_scripts: 500;
                            max_total_script_source_bytes: 4194304;
                            max_workers: 500;
                        };
                        observation_ms: 100;
                        source_capture_approved: false;
                        target_id: "TARGET_ID_FROM_LIST_ELECTRON_TARGETS";
                    };
                    title: "Inspect an approved Electron page";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    allowed_file_roots: ZodPipe<
                        ZodArray<ZodString>,
                        ZodTransform<string[], string[]>,
                    >;
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    cdp_endpoint: ZodPipe<ZodString, ZodTransform<string, string>>;
                    include_script_sources: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_dom_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_frames: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_resources: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_script_source_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_scripts: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_script_source_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_workers: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    observation_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                    source_capture_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    target_id: ZodString;
                },
                $strip,
            >;
            kind: "electron-provider";
            name: "inspect_electron_page";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            browser: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    js_version: ZodString;
                                    product: ZodString;
                                    protocol_version: ZodString;
                                    revision: ZodString;
                                    user_agent: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            capture_window: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    ended_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                    observation_ms: ZodNumber;
                                    started_at: ZodISODateTime;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            completeness: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attach_limited_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    conditions: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                attach_limited: ...;
                                                complete_within_window: ...;
                                                policy_filtered: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    dropped_events: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            console_events: ZodNumber;
                                            network_requests: ZodNumber;
                                            scripts: ZodNumber;
                                            timeline_events: ZodNumber;
                                            total: ZodNumber;
                                            webmcp_tools: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_connections: ZodNumber;
                                            websocket_frames: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    excluded: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<{ count: ...; reason: ...; section: ... }, $strip>,
                                    >;
                                    policy_filtered_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            attach_limited: "attach_limited";
                                            complete_within_window: "complete_within_window";
                                            policy_filtered: "policy_filtered";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    truncated_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    unavailable_sections: ZodArray<
                                        ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                accessibility: ...;
                                                console_events: ...;
                                                console_text: ...;
                                                dom: ...;
                                                frames: ...;
                                                json_body_shapes: ...;
                                                metadata: ...;
                                                network_initiators: ...;
                                                network_requests: ...;
                                                resources: ...;
                                                screenshot: ...;
                                                script_sources: ...;
                                                scripts: ...;
                                                source_maps: ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                storage_keys: ...;
                                                timeline: ...;
                                                webmcp_tools: ...;
                                                websocket_connections: ...;
                                                websocket_frames: ...;
                                                websocket_shapes: ...;
                                                workers: ...;
                                            },
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            dom: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    nodes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                attribute_names: ...;
                                                index: ...;
                                                node_name: ...;
                                                node_type: ...;
                                                node_value_length: ...;
                                                parent_index: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    total_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            frames: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        file_path: ZodString;
                                        frame_id: ZodString;
                                        parent_frame_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            resources: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        content_size: ZodNullable<ZodNumber>;
                                        file_path: ZodString;
                                        mime_type: ZodString;
                                        resource_key: ZodString;
                                        type: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            scripts: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    items: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                cdp_hash: ...;
                                                file_path: ...;
                                                frame_id: ...;
                                                is_module: ...;
                                                language: ...;
                                                length: ...;
                                                script_key: ...;
                                                source: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    total: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            target: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    attached: ZodBoolean;
                                    file_path: ZodString;
                                    target_id: ZodString;
                                    title: ZodString;
                                    type: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            workers: ZodDefault<
                                ZodArray<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            attached: ZodBoolean;
                                            file_path: ZodString;
                                            opener_target_id: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            parent_frame_id: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            target_id: ZodString;
                                            type: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Statically reconstruct one approved local ASAR or extracted JavaScript application as Evidence v2 and JavaScript Application Graph v1. Maps BrowserWindow preferences, preload and contextBridge APIs, literal and dynamic IPC, handler locations, sender-validation observations, utility processes, and requested native addon bindings without executing JavaScript; source-map contents require separate approval.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        approved: true;
                        format: "auto";
                        input_path: "/Applications/Example.app/Contents/Resources/app.asar";
                        source_map_read_approved: false;
                    };
                    title: "Analyze one approved local Electron application";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    approved: ZodLiteral<true>;
                    format: ZodDefault<
                        ZodEnum<{ asar: "asar"; auto: "auto"; directory: "directory" }>,
                    >;
                    input_path: ZodString;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_artifact_entry_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_ast_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_compression_ratio: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_entries: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_findings: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_modules: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_parse_milliseconds: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_path_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_source_map_sources: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_text_file_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_text_files: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_artifact_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_total_text_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    source_map_read_approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "electron-provider";
            name: "analyze_javascript_application";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            format: ZodEnum<{ asar: "asar"; directory: "directory" }>;
                            graph: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    coverage: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            limits: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_count: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            truncated: ZodBoolean;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >;
                                    edges: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                edge_id: ...;
                                                evidence: ...;
                                                identifier_strategy: ...;
                                                properties: ...;
                                                relation: ...;
                                                source_node_id: ...;
                                                target_node_id: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    graph_id: ZodString;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    nodes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { identity: ...; kind: ...; node_id: ...; observations: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    root_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    schema: ZodLiteral<"JavaScriptApplicationGraph">;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            input_path: ZodString;
                            inventory_graph_sha256: ZodString;
                            inventory_manifest_id: ZodString;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            root_artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            statistics: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    findings: ZodNumber;
                                    invalid_utf8_files: ZodNumber;
                                    limit_omitted_text_files: ZodNumber;
                                    modules: ZodNumber;
                                    nested_asar_containers: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_text_files: ZodNumber;
                                    parse_failures: ZodNumber;
                                    parsed_javascript_files: ZodNumber;
                                    policy_filtered_text_files: ZodNumber;
                                    relevant_files: ZodNumber;
                                    text_bytes_read: ZodNumber;
                                    text_files_selected: ZodNumber;
                                    truncated_scopes: ZodNumber;
                                    visited_ast_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            summary: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    browser_windows: ZodNumber;
                                    context_bridge_apis: ZodNumber;
                                    explicit_web_preferences: ZodNumber;
                                    exposed_api_members: ZodNumber;
                                    ipc: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            ambiguous_renderer_transmissions: ZodNumber;
                                            dynamic_channel_operations: ZodNumber;
                                            literal_channels: ZodNumber;
                                            main_handlers: ZodNumber;
                                            operations: ZodNumber;
                                            paired_renderer_transmissions: ZodNumber;
                                            renderer_listeners: ZodNumber;
                                            renderer_transmissions: ZodNumber;
                                            unpaired_literal_renderer_transmissions: ZodNumber;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >;
                                    native_addon_bindings: ZodNumber;
                                    preload_entrypoints: ZodNumber;
                                    resolved_native_addon_bindings: ZodNumber;
                                    resolved_utility_entrypoints: ZodNumber;
                                    sender_validation_observations: ZodNumber;
                                    utility_processes: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Reconcile verified static JavaScript application graphs with existing passive web or Electron CDP Evidence. Exact captured-source digests take priority over caller-declared file/URL mappings; target, frame, script, and worker ambiguity remains explicit, and source-map authority stays separate.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        runtime_observations: (
                            | {
                                analysis_profile: {
                                    digest: string;
                                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                    provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                    schema_version: 1;
                                };
                                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";
                                confidence: "observed"
                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";
                                environment:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: string;
                                        id: string;
                                        isolation: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        platform: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                                evidence_id: string;
                                evidence_links: string[];
                                limitations: string[];
                                locations: (
                                    | { address: ...; kind: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                    | { kind: ...; path: ... }
                                    | { kind: ...; offset: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                )[];
                                normalized_result: JSONType;
                                operation: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                predicate_type: string;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                                raw_result: JSONType;
                                schema_version: 2;
                                subject:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        digest: { sha256: ... };
                                        format:
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)

                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...)
                                            | (...);
                                        local_path: string;
                                        name: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;
                            }
                            | {
                                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";
                                confidence: "observed"
                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";
                                environment:
                                    | {
                                        architecture: string;
                                        id: string;
                                        isolation: (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...)
                                        | (...);
                                        platform: string;
                                    }
                                    | null;

                                evidence_links: string[];
                                limitations: string[];

                                    | { address: ...; kind: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }

                                    | { kind: ...; offset: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                )[];

                            analysis: | {

                                    parameters: Record<(...), (...)>;
                                    provider: { id: ...; name: ...; version: ... };

                                    schema_version: 1;
                                };

                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"
                                | "external-service"
                                | "analyst-inference";

                                | "derived"
                                | "inferred";

                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"

                                operation: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                predicate_type: string;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: (...) | (...) };

                                schema_version: 2;
                                subject:
                                    | {

                                        digest: ...;
