                                    | null;
                            };
                            role: string;
                        }[];
                    };
                    title: "Reconcile one passive Electron capture";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_reconciliation_items: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_runtime_entities: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_static_load_states: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    runtime_observations: ZodArray<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            digest: ZodString;
                                            parameters: ZodRecord<(...), (...)>;
                                            provider: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >;
                                authority: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                        "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                        "external-service": "external-service";
                                        "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                        "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                    },
                                >;
                                confidence: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        derived: "derived";
                                        inferred: "inferred";
                                        observed: "observed";
                                    },
                                >;
                                environment: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            architecture: ZodString;
                                            id: ZodString;
                                            isolation: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            platform: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >;
                                evidence_id: ZodString;
                                evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                locations: ZodArray<
                                    ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                        [
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                            ZodObject<(...), (...)>,
                                        ],
                                        "kind",
                                    >,
                                >;
                                normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                operation: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                predicate_type: ZodString;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                        version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                subject: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            architecture: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            digest: ZodObject<(...), (...)>;
                                            format: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            local_path: ZodString;
                                            name: ZodString;
                                        },
                                        $strip,
                                    >,
                                >;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    static_layers: ZodArray<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                analysis: ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        analysis_profile: ZodOptional<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        authority: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analyst-inference": ...;
                                                "controlled-replay": ...;
                                                "external-service": ...;
                                                "historical-reference": ...;
                                                "shipped-artifact": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        confidence: ZodEnum<{ derived: ...; inferred: ...; observed: ... }>;
                                        environment: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        locations: ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<(...), (...)>>;
                                        normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                        operation: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        predicate_type: ZodString;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                        subject: ZodNullable<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >;
                                role: ZodEnum<
                                    { application: "application"; assets: "assets"; cache: "cache" },
                                >;
                                runtime_mappings: ZodDefault<
                                    ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<[(...), (...)], "kind">>,
                                >;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "electron-provider";
            name: "reconcile_javascript_runtime";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            coverage: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    omitted_graph_items: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_reconciliation_items: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_runtime_entities: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_static_load_states: ZodNumber;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "complete-within-inputs": "complete-within-inputs";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    truncated: ZodBoolean;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            graph: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    coverage: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            limits: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_count: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            truncated: ZodBoolean;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >;
                                    edges: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                edge_id: ...;
                                                evidence: ...;
                                                identifier_strategy: ...;
                                                properties: ...;
                                                relation: ...;
                                                source_node_id: ...;
                                                target_node_id: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    graph_id: ZodString;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    nodes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { identity: ...; kind: ...; node_id: ...; observations: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    root_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    schema: ZodLiteral<"JavaScriptApplicationGraph">;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            reconciliation_id: ZodString;
                            reconciliations: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        basis: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "artifact-path": ...;
                                                "content-and-location": ...;
                                                "content-sha256": ...;
                                                "module-source-sha256": ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                "operator-file-mapping": ...;
                                                "operator-url-mapping": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        candidate_static_count: ZodNumber;
                                        candidate_static_nodes: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        confidence: ZodEnum<
                                            { exact: ...; high: ...; low: ...; medium: ...; unknown: ... },
                                        >;
                                        entity_kind: ZodEnum<
                                            { frame: ...; script: ...; target: ...; worker: ... },
                                        >;
                                        reason: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "ambiguous-static-candidates": ...;
                                                "captured-content-disagrees-with-static-location": ...;
                                                "content-and-location-match": ...;
                                                "no-authorized-location-mapping": ...;
                                                "no-static-content-match": ...;
                                                "reconciliation-limit-reached": ...;
                                                "runtime-frame-unattributed": ...;
                                                "static-or-runtime-coverage-incomplete": ...;
                                                "unique-content-match": ...;
                                                "unique-location-match": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        reconciliation_id: ZodString;
                                        runtime_evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        runtime_node_id: ZodString;
                                        static_layer_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        static_node_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        status: ZodEnum<
                                            { ambiguous: ...; matched: ...; unknown: ...; unmatched: ... },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            runtime_captures: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        capture_sha256: ZodString;
                                        evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        frames: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodEnum<{ browser: ...; electron: ... }>;
                                        scripts: ZodNumber;
                                        scripts_complete_within_scope: ZodBoolean;
                                        target_key: ZodString;
                                        target_location: ZodString;
                                        target_node_id: ZodString;
                                        workers: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            source_map_authority: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    limitation: ZodString;
                                    runtime_script_declarations: ZodNumber;
                                    static_layers_with_read_approval: ZodNumber;
                                    used_for_primary_matching: ZodLiteral<false>;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            static_layers: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        evidence_id: ZodString;
                                        format: ZodEnum<{ asar: ...; directory: ... }>;
                                        graph_id: ZodString;
                                        input_path: ZodString;
                                        layer_id: ZodString;
                                        role: ZodEnum<{ application: ...; assets: ...; cache: ... }>;
                                        root_artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                                        runtime_mappings: ZodArray<ZodDiscriminatedUnion<(...), (...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            static_load_states: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        kind: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "javascript-asset": ...;
                                                "javascript-chunk": ...;
                                                "javascript-module": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        reason: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "containing-asset-was-loaded": ...;
                                                "layer-outside-runtime-scope": ...;
                                                "not-observed-in-bounded-capture": ...;
                                                "runtime-script-correspondence": ...;
                                                "static-or-runtime-coverage-incomplete": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        runtime_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        static_layer_id: ZodString;
                                        static_node_id: ZodString;
                                        status: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                loaded: ...;
                                                "not-observed-in-capture": ...;
                                                "resident-in-loaded-asset": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            summary: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    ambiguous: ZodNumber;
                                    matched: ZodNumber;
                                    runtime_frames: ZodNumber;
                                    runtime_scripts: ZodNumber;
                                    runtime_targets: ZodNumber;
                                    runtime_workers: ZodNumber;
                                    static_loaded: ZodNumber;
                                    static_not_observed: ZodNumber;
                                    static_resident: ZodNumber;
                                    static_unknown: ZodNumber;
                                    unknown: ZodNumber;
                                    unmatched: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Trace a typed literal seed through an authenticated JavaScript Application Graph with explicit direction, depth, node, edge, and path bounds. Original static, native, passive-runtime, inferred, and unknown authorities remain distinct; native addon handoffs never open a provider or execute the application.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        application: | {
                            analysis_profile: {
                                digest: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                schema_version: 1;
                            };
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];
                            normalized_result: JSONType;
                            operation: string;
                            parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                            predicate_type: string;
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                            raw_result: JSONType;
                            schema_version: 2;
                            subject:
                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
                                    digest: { sha256: string };
                                    format:
                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"
                                        | "directory"
                                        | "javascript"
                                        | "source-map"
                                        | "plist"
                                        | "entitlements"
                                        | "dmg"
                                        | "zip"
                                        | "pkg"
                                        | "asar"
                                        | "javascript-bundle"
                                        | "mach-o-universal"
                                        | "mach-o"
                                        | "elf"
                                        | "pe"
                                        | "hopper"
                                        | "analysis-database"
                                        | "ipa"
                                        | "apk";
                                    local_path: string;
                                    name: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                        }
                        | {
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];
                            normalized_result: JSONType;
                            operation: string;
                            parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                            predicate_type: string;
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                            raw_result: JSONType;
                            schema_version: 2;
                            subject:
                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
                                    digest: { sha256: string };
                                    format:
                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"
                                        | "directory"
                                        | "javascript"
                                        | "source-map"
                                        | "plist"
                                        | "entitlements"
                                        | "dmg"
                                        | "zip"
                                        | "pkg"
                                        | "asar"
                                        | "javascript-bundle"
                                        | "mach-o-universal"
                                        | "mach-o"
                                        | "elf"
                                        | "pe"
                                        | "hopper"
                                        | "analysis-database"
                                        | "ipa"
                                        | "apk";
                                    local_path: string;
                                    name: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                        };
                        direction: "both";
                        seed: {
                            case_sensitive: boolean;
                            kind: "module";
                            match: "exact";
                            value: string;
                        };
                    };
                    title: "Trace one module seed through a retained application graph";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    application: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    direction: ZodDefault<
                        ZodEnum<
                            { both: "both"; incoming: "incoming"; outgoing: "outgoing" },
                        >,
                    >;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_edges: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_paths: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_seed_matches: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    native_observations: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                digest: ...;
                                                parameters: ...;
                                                provider: ...;
                                                provider_profile_schema_version: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    seed: ZodObject<
                        {
                            case_sensitive: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                            kind: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    api: "api";
                                    channel: "channel";
                                    module: "module";
                                    "native-export": "native-export";
                                    "node-id": "node-id";
                                    route: "route";
                                    string: "string";
                                },
                            >;
                            match: ZodDefault<
                                ZodNullable<ZodEnum<{ contains: "contains"; exact: "exact" }>>,
                            >;
                            value: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "trace_application_feature";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            coverage: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    frontier_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    omitted_edges: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_paths: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_seed_matches: ZodNumber;
                                    scanned_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                    source_graph_status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            complete: "complete";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            unavailable: "unavailable";
                                            unknown: "unknown";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "complete-within-source": "complete-within-source";
                                            "no-match": "no-match";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    total_seed_matches: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            direction: ZodEnum<
                                { both: "both"; incoming: "incoming"; outgoing: "outgoing" },
                            >;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            graph: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        coverage: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                limits: ...;
                                                omitted_count: ...;
                                                status: ...;
                                                truncated: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        edges: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        graph_id: ZodString;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        nodes: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        root_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        schema: ZodLiteral<"JavaScriptApplicationGraph">;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            native_handoffs: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        artifact_path: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                                        evidence_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        export_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        native_node_id: ZodString;
                                        providers: ZodArray<ZodObject<(...), (...)>>;
                                        recommended_tools: ZodArray<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        requested_exports: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        status: ZodEnum<
                                            { "evidence-linked": ...; "requires-provider-analysis": ... },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            paths: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        authorities: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        contains_inference: ZodBoolean;
                                        edge_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        end_kind: ZodString;
                                        end_node_id: ZodString;
                                        node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        path_id: ZodString;
                                        start_node_id: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            seed: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    case_sensitive: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                                    kind: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            api: "api";
                                            channel: "channel";
                                            module: "module";
                                            "native-export": "native-export";
                                            "node-id": "node-id";
                                            route: "route";
                                            string: "string";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    match: ZodDefault<ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>>;
                                    value: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            seed_matches: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        basis: ZodEnum<
                                            { identity: ...; label: ...; "node-id": ...; property: ... },
                                        >;
                                        field: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodString;
                                        node_id: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            source_evidence_id: ZodString;
                            source_graph_id: ZodString;
                            summary: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    inferred_facts: ZodNumber;
                                    matched_seeds: ZodNumber;
                                    native_handoffs: ZodNumber;
                                    observed_facts: ZodNumber;
                                    terminal_paths: ZodNumber;
                                    traced_edges: ZodNumber;
                                    traced_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                    unavailable_facts: ZodNumber;
                                    unknown_facts: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            trace_id: ZodString;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: false;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: true;
            };
            description: "Compare two authenticated JavaScript Application Graph versions using unique-only exact digest, module source digest, source-map identity, structural fingerprint, and non-module semantic-key tiers. Reports added, removed, changed, ambiguous, and unknown entities plus a bounded changed_from graph without fuzzy or module-ordinal pairing.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        left: | {
                            analysis_profile: {
                                digest: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                                schema_version: 1;
                            };
                            authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"
                            | "analyst-inference";
                            confidence: "observed"
                            | "derived"
                            | "inferred";
                            environment:
                                | {
                                    architecture: string;
                                    id: string;
                                    isolation: "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine";
                                    platform: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                            evidence_id: string;
                            evidence_links: string[];
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];

                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
