            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    left: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    left_native_observations: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                digest: ...;
                                                parameters: ...;
                                                provider: ...;
                                                provider_profile_schema_version: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                max_candidate_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_comparison_items: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_graph_edges: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                max_graph_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    right: ZodObject<
                        {
                            analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        digest: ZodString;
                                        parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                        provider: ZodObject<{ id: ...; name: ...; version: ... }, $strip>;
                                        provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                        schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            authority: ZodEnum<
                                {
                                    "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                    "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                    "external-service": "external-service";
                                    "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                    "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                },
                            >;
                            confidence: ZodEnum<
                                { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                            >;
                            environment: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodString;
                                        id: ZodString;
                                        isolation: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                container: ...;
                                                none: ...;
                                                process: ...;
                                                "virtual-machine": ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        platform: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                            evidence_id: ZodString;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            locations: ZodArray<
                                ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                    [
                                        ZodObject<{ address: ...; kind: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; path: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ kind: ...; offset: ... }, $strip>,
                                        ZodObject<{ end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }, $strip>,
                                    ],
                                    "kind",
                                >,
                            >;
                            normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                            operation: ZodString;
                            parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                            predicate_type: ZodString;
                            provider: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    id: ZodString;
                                    name: ZodString;
                                    version: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                },
                                $strip,
                            >;
                            raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                            subject: ZodNullable<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        architecture: ZodNullable<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ... }, $strip>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                "analysis-database": ...;
                                                apk: ...;
                                                asar: ...;
                                                directory: ...;
                                                dmg: ...;
                                                elf: ...;
                                                entitlements: ...;
                                                file: ...;
                                                hopper: ...;
                                                ipa: ...;
                                                javascript: ...;
                                                "javascript-bundle": ...;
                                                "mach-o": ...;
                                                "mach-o-universal": ...;
                                                pe: ...;
                                                pkg: ...;
                                                plist: ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                zip: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        local_path: ZodString;
                                        name: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    right_native_observations: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                {
                                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                digest: ...;
                                                parameters: ...;
                                                provider: ...;
                                                provider_profile_schema_version: ...;
                                                schema_version: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    authority: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                                            "external-service": "external-service";
                                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            derived: "derived";
                                            inferred: "inferred";
                                            observed: "observed";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    environment: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { architecture: ...; id: ...; isolation: ...; platform: ... },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    locations: ZodArray<
                                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                                            [(...), (...), (...), (...), (...)],
                                            "kind",
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    normalized_result: ZodJSONSchema;
                                    operation: ZodString;
                                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                                    provider: ZodObject<
                                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<(...)> },
                                        $strip,
                                    >;
                                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                                    subject: ZodNullable<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                architecture: ...;
                                                digest: ...;
                                                format: ...;
                                                local_path: ...;
                                                name: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strip,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    unknown_registry_approved: ZodOptional<ZodLiteral<true>>;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
            kind: "application";
            name: "compare_application_versions";
            outputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    analysis_profile: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                digest: ZodString;
                                parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                                provider: ZodObject<
                                    { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >;
                                provider_profile_schema_version: ZodNumber;
                                schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    authority: ZodEnum<
                        {
                            "analyst-inference": "analyst-inference";
                            "controlled-replay": "controlled-replay";
                            "external-service": "external-service";
                            "historical-reference": "historical-reference";
                            "shipped-artifact": "shipped-artifact";
                        },
                    >;
                    confidence: ZodEnum<
                        { derived: "derived"; inferred: "inferred"; observed: "observed" },
                    >;
                    environment: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodString;
                                id: ZodString;
                                isolation: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        container: "container";
                                        none: "none";
                                        process: "process";
                                        "virtual-machine": "virtual-machine";
                                    },
                                >;
                                platform: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                    evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                    locations: ZodArray<
                        ZodDiscriminatedUnion<
                            [
                                ZodObject<
                                    { address: ZodString; kind: ZodLiteral<"address"> },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodString;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"address-range">;
                                        start: ZodString;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"artifact-path">; path: ZodString },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    { kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset">; offset: ZodNumber },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        end: ZodNumber;
                                        kind: ZodLiteral<"file-offset-range">;
                                        start: ZodNumber;
                                    },
                                    $strip,
                                >,
                            ],
                            "kind",
                        >,
                    >;
                    normalized_result: ZodObject<
                        {
                            comparison_id: ZodString;
                            coverage: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    left_graph_status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            complete: "complete";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            unavailable: "unavailable";
                                            unknown: "unknown";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    omitted_candidate_references: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_comparison_items: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_graph_edges: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_graph_nodes: ZodNumber;
                                    omitted_graph_observations: ZodNumber;
                                    right_graph_status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            complete: "complete";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            unavailable: "unavailable";
                                            unknown: "unknown";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                    status: ZodEnum<
                                        {
                                            "complete-within-inputs": "complete-within-inputs";
                                            partial: "partial";
                                            truncated: "truncated";
                                        },
                                    >;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            graph: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    coverage: ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            limits: ZodArray<(...)>;
                                            omitted_count: ZodNullable<(...)>;
                                            status: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            truncated: ZodBoolean;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >;
                                    edges: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                edge_id: ...;
                                                evidence: ...;
                                                identifier_strategy: ...;
                                                properties: ...;
                                                relation: ...;
                                                source_node_id: ...;
                                                target_node_id: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    graph_id: ZodString;
                                    limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    nodes: ZodArray<
                                        ZodObject<
                                            { identity: ...; kind: ...; node_id: ...; observations: ... },
                                            $strict,
                                        >,
                                    >;
                                    root_node_ids: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                    schema: ZodLiteral<"JavaScriptApplicationGraph">;
                                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            items: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        dimensions: ZodArray<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                        evidence_links: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        item_id: ZodString;
                                        left_node_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                                        match: ZodObject<
                                            {
                                                basis: ...;
                                                candidate_left_node_ids: ...;
                                                candidate_right_node_ids: ...;
                                                confidence: ...;
                                                status: ...;
                                            },
                                            $strict,
                                        >;
                                        node_kind: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                artifact: ...;
                                                "asar-entry": ...;
                                                "browser-window": ...;
                                                "context-bridge-api": ...;
                                                "electron-main": ...;
                                                "electron-preload": ...;
                                                "electron-renderer": ...;
                                                "electron-utility": ...;
                                                endpoint: ...;
                                                frame: ...;
                                                installer: ...;
                                                "ipc-channel": ...;
                                                "ipc-handler": ...;
                                                "javascript-asset": ...;
                                                "javascript-chunk": ...;
                                                "javascript-module": ...;
                                                "native-addon": ...;
                                                "native-export": ...;
                                                package: ...;
                                                "runtime-script-instance": ...;
                                                "service-worker": ...;
                                                "source-map": ...;
                                                "source-module": ...;
                                                storage: ...;
                                                target: ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                                worker: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                        right_node_id: ZodNullable<ZodString>;
                                        status: ZodEnum<
                                            {
                                                added: ...;
                                                changed: ...;
                                                removed: ...;
                                                unchanged: ...;
                                                unknown: ...;
                                            },
                                        >;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                            left: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    graph_id: ZodString;
                                    root_artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            limitations: ZodArray<ZodString>;
                            matching: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    ambiguous: ZodNumber;
                                    exact_content_digest: ZodNumber;
                                    exact_module_source_digest: ZodNumber;
                                    exact_node_identity: ZodNumber;
                                    semantic_key: ZodNumber;
                                    source_map_identity: ZodNumber;
                                    structural_fingerprint: ZodNumber;
                                    unmatched: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            right: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    evidence_id: ZodString;
                                    graph_id: ZodString;
                                    root_artifact_sha256: ZodString;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                            schema_version: ZodLiteral<1>;
                            summary: ZodObject<
                                {
                                    added: ZodNumber;
                                    changed: ZodNumber;
                                    removed: ZodNumber;
                                    unchanged: ZodNumber;
                                    unknown: ZodNumber;
                                },
                                $strict,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    operation: ZodString;
                    parameters: ZodRecord<ZodString, ZodJSONSchema>;
                    predicate_type: ZodString;
                    provider: ZodObject<
                        { id: ZodString; name: ZodString; version: ZodNullable<ZodString> },
                        $strip,
                    >;
                    raw_result: ZodNullable<ZodJSONSchema>;
                    schema_version: ZodLiteral<2>;
                    subject: ZodNullable<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                architecture: ZodNullable<
                                    ZodEnum<
                                        { arm: "arm"; arm64: "arm64"; x86: "x86"; x86_64: "x86_64" },
                                    >,
                                >;
                                digest: ZodObject<{ sha256: ZodString }, $strip>;
                                format: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "analysis-database": "analysis-database";
                                        apk: "apk";
                                        asar: "asar";
                                        directory: "directory";
                                        dmg: "dmg";
                                        elf: "elf";
                                        entitlements: "entitlements";
                                        file: "file";
                                        hopper: "hopper";
                                        ipa: "ipa";
                                        javascript: "javascript";
                                        "javascript-bundle": "javascript-bundle";
                                        "mach-o": "mach-o";
                                        "mach-o-universal": "mach-o-universal";
                                        pe: "pe";
                                        pkg: "pkg";
                                        plist: "plist";
                                        "source-map": "source-map";
                                        unknown: "unknown";
                                        zip: "zip";
                                    },
                                >;
                                local_path: ZodString;
                                name: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strip,
                        >,
                    >;
                },
                $strict,
            >;
        },
        {
            annotations: {
                destructiveHint: true;
                idempotentHint: true;
                openWorldHint: false;
                readOnlyHint: false;
            };
            description: "Plan or execute a content-bound extracted-module JavaScript replay inside the Linux Bubblewrap, seccomp, and cgroup boundary. Execution requires approved: true and the exact plan digest. Supports deterministic boundary cases and optional left/right differential comparison; observations have controlled-replay authority and do not claim real application runtime behavior.";
            examples: readonly [
                {
                    input: {
                        approved: false;
                        cases: [{ arguments: [""]; case_id: "empty" }];
                        determinism: {
                            clock_iso: "2000-01-01T00:00:00.000Z";
                            locale: "en-US";
                            platform: "linux";
                            random_seed: 0;
                            timezone: "UTC";
                        };
                        left: {
                            entry_alias: "parser";
                            entry_export: "default";
                            modules: [
                                {
                                    alias: "parser";
                                    dependencies: {};
                                    format: "esm";
                                    path: "/approved/parser.mjs";
                                    role: "module";
                                },
                            ];
                        };
                        limits: {
                            cpu_quota_percent: 50;
                            input_bytes: 262144;
                            memory_bytes: 134217728;
                            module_bytes: 4194304;
                            output_bytes: 524288;
                            protocol_bytes: 16777216;
                            result_depth: 16;
                            result_nodes: 10000;
                            stderr_bytes: 32768;
                            tasks: 8;
                            tmpfs_bytes: 16777216;
                            wall_time_ms: 3000;
                        };
                        mode: "plan";
                    };
                    title: "Plan one extracted ESM parser replay";
                },
            ];
            inputSchema: ZodObject<
                {
                    approved: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                    cases: ZodDefault<
                        ZodArray<
                            ZodObject<
                                { arguments: ZodArray<ZodJSONSchema>; case_id: ZodString },
                                $strict,
                            >,
                        >,
                    >;
                    determinism: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                clock_iso: ZodDefault<ZodISODateTime>;
                                locale: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<"en-US">>;
                                platform: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<"linux">>;
                                random_seed: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                timezone: ZodDefault<ZodLiteral<"UTC">>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    generator: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                count: ZodNumber;
                                preset: ZodEnum<
                                    {
                                        "clipboard-boundaries": "clipboard-boundaries";
                                        "parser-boundaries": "parser-boundaries";
                                        "sanitizer-boundaries": "sanitizer-boundaries";
                                    },
                                >;
                                seed: ZodNumber;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    left: ZodObject<
                        {
                            entry_alias: ZodString;
                            entry_export: ZodDefault<ZodString>;
                            modules: ZodArray<
                                ZodObject<
                                    {
                                        alias: ZodString;
                                        dependencies: ZodDefault<ZodRecord<(...), (...)>>;
                                        format: ZodEnum<{ "commonjs-factory": ...; esm: ... }>;
                                        path: ZodString;
                                        role: ZodDefault<ZodEnum<(...)>>;
                                    },
                                    $strict,
                                >,
                            >;
                        },
                        $strict,
                    >;
                    limits: ZodDefault<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                cpu_quota_percent: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                input_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                memory_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                module_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                output_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                protocol_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                result_depth: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                result_nodes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                stderr_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                tasks: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                tmpfs_bytes: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                                wall_time_ms: ZodDefault<ZodNumber>;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    mode: ZodEnum<{ execute: "execute"; plan: "plan" }>;
                    plan_digest: ZodOptional<ZodString>;
                    reproducer_export: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                approved: ZodBoolean;
                                include_sources: ZodDefault<ZodBoolean>;
                                path: ZodString;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
                    >;
                    right: ZodOptional<
                        ZodObject<
                            {
                                entry_alias: ZodString;
                                entry_export: ZodDefault<ZodString>;
                                modules: ZodArray<
                                    ZodObject<
                                        {
                                            alias: ZodString;
                                            dependencies: ZodDefault<(...)>;
                                            format: ZodEnum<(...)>;
                                            path: ZodString;
                                            role: ZodDefault<(...)>;
                                        },
                                        $strict,
                                    >,
                                >;
                            },
                            $strict,
                        >,
